data.title: Crypto VC funding drops to bear market levels in February
data.description:
VC funding for crypto projects slowed down dramatically in February, reflecting the market downturn. Funds are more selective about projects that can deliver results and are adaptable to a shifting market.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/crypto-vc-funding-drops-in-february/

data.title: Bitcoin Retail Investor Demand Rebounds to Neutral Levels
data.description: According to Foresight News, Cointelegraph reports that Bitcoin retail investor demand is experiencing a resurgence. The 30-day demand change rate has improved from -21% to a neutral level. The last time a similar level was observed was in 2021. Historical data suggests that such recoveries often precede price increases.

data.title: SEC Closes Robinhood Crypto Investigation Without Taking Action
data.description: Robinhood Markets Inc. (NASDAQ: HOOD) announced that the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has officially closed its investigation into Robinhood Crypto without pursuing any enforcement action. This development marks a significant regulatory victory for the trading platform, which has faced increased scrutiny over its crypto-related services.SEC Investigation Ends Without PenaltiesThe SEC had been investigating Robinhood Crypto’s operations, compliance measures, and potential violations of securities laws. However, after months of review, the agency decided to drop the inquiry without imposing fines or regulatory penalties.

data.title: Canary Files for HBAR ETF on Nasdaq, Marking a Major Milestone for Hedera
data.description: Canary, a prominent asset management firm, has officially filed for a Hedera (HBAR) exchange-traded fund (ETF) with Nasdaq, according to reports from Intel. This marks a historic step for Hedera, as it could become one of the first blockchain networks outside Bitcoin and Ethereum to have a spot ETF in the U.S. market.

data.description:
Hackers allegedly laundered Bybit hack funds through eXch’s platform. eXch denies responsibility for handling stolen funds through statements to the media. The Bybit hack is one of many crypto hacks. source: https://www.altcoinbuzz.io/bitcoin-and-crypto-guide/exch-denies-role-in-laundering-bybit-hack-funds/

data.title: KIP Protocol denies involvement in Libra launch
data.description:
KIP Protocol has released a statement denying any involvement in the initiation or management of the Libra cryptocurrency launch.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/342933/kip-protocol-denies-involvement-in-libra-launch?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Robert Kiyosaki says incompetent leaders are pushing the world into recession
data.description:

Last week, President Donald Trump and Tesla CEO Elon Musk publicly questioned whether the gold at Fort Knox is still intact. In a Monday X […]

data.title: Is The Bitcoin Price Manipulated? Expert Exposes The Truth
data.description:
In a new research report shared on X, Joe Consorti, Head of Growth at Theya, has dispelled ongoing rumors alleging that the Bitcoin price is being artificially held down. Consorti lays out a comprehensive examination of on-chain data, pointing to the normal cyclical behavior of long-term holders (LTHs) and their profit-taking patterns as key drivers of bitcoin’s current trading dynamic. Is The...
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin/bitcoin-price-manipulated-expert-truth/

Recently, crypto exchange Robinhood announced Monday that the SEC is dropping its investigation into its crypto arm. The company shared in a detailed blog post that it received a letter from the SEC’s Enforcement Division on Friday, confirming the case is closed with no further...
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/robinhood-scores-big-win-as-sec-dismisses-crypto-unit-investigation/

data.title: CZ: I don’t remember where EURI came from, maybe it’s related to Binance Card
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News CZ posted on the X platform that he no longer remembers where EURI came from, and it may be related to Binance Card. Perhaps in the early days of Binance Card, it was a currency used for consumption. 
Earlier news CZ announced his investment portfolio on Binance Square, of which BNB accounted for 98.51%, BTC accounted for 1.32%, and EURI accounted for 0.17%.
